errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.ERROR_ADMIN_REQUIRED: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.ERROR_MANAGER_REQUIRED: You need manager permissions to perform this action.
errors.ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You don't have the required permissions.

fieldDescriptions.accepting: Master switch. When off, customers cannot create new reservations through any channel.
fieldDescriptions.defaultTurn: How long, on average, a party occupies a table before it is considered available again.
fieldDescriptions.minAdvance: Earliest gap (in minutes) between now and a reservation start time that we still accept.
fieldDescriptions.maxAdvance: How many days into the future customers can book a reservation.
fieldDescriptions.noShowGrace: How long after the start time we wait before automatically marking a reservation as no-show.
fieldDescriptions.turnRanges: Override the default turn time for specific party-size ranges. First matching range wins.
fieldDescriptions.blackouts: Date ranges in which we will not accept any reservations regardless of other settings.

messages.usingDefaults: Using defaults. Save to persist your own values.
messages.rangeFallback: First matching range wins. If no range matches, the default turn time is used.
